sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41236" key="e)pitakte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτακ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n41236.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must enjoin,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg010:1:35D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.35D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
